title: PuffPack
body:
⚠️ Resource Pack required
![img](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/B5gSXvnL/images/a1f81411b0b04d8a839d3c5e10c183e0f4e24d5d.png) 
Use /function puffpack/settings to configure the datapack
ㅤ
